case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. FREDDY A FUENTES et al

docket_entries.description: GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT FUENTES, FREDDY A

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-17-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON FEB-27-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
